allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
V-3.0: Security hardening, floor plan configurator, and UX polish

- Admin floor plan configurator with drag-drop booth placement, two-point
  calibration, vendor assignment, and visibility controls
- Shared SVG floor plan renderer used by both admin and public viewer
- InteractiveMap refactored: loads dynamic config from Firestore with
  date-gated guest access and payment-gated vendor access, falls back
  to legacy 8x15 grid when no config exists
- Security: auth-gated all Netlify functions, removed customAmount from
  checkout, added Stripe webhook signature verification, dynamic admin
  emails in Firestore rules
- Store.js: Firestore listener lifecycle management, 60s duplicate lead
  suppression, query limits, proper error logging
- VendorRegistration: atomic booth reservation via Firestore transaction,
  form validation, draft recovery via localStorage
- EditVendorProfile: migrated from base64 to Firebase Storage with
  client-side image compression
- Admin dashboard: enhanced leads tab with search, type filter, inline
  notes editing; added floor plan tab
- UX: touch targets bumped to 44px, debounced card preview, mobile
  scroll hints, admin card access buttons

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
